sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n441" key="a)gelh/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγελ-ήτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n441.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to a herd</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βοῦς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγελάτης</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
